cases.name: 代表例: 2つの店舗をthisとして呼び分ける

input.factory: () => { const judge = function(visits, purchasePoint) { let score = visits * this.visitPoint + purchasePoint; if (this.weekend) { score += this.weekendBonus; } let rank = "regular"; if (score >= this.goldLine) { rank = "gold"; } else if (score >= this.silverLine) { rank = "silver"; } return this.name + ":" + rank + ":" + score; }; return { judge: judge, stores: [{ name: "east", visitPoint: 8, weekendBonus: 12, silverLine: 40, goldLine: 70, weekend: true }, { name: "west", visitPoint: 5, weekendBonus: 0, silverLine: 30, goldLine: 55, weekend: false }], requests: [{ storeIndex: 0, args: [4, 20] }, { storeIndex: 1, args: [3, 15] }, { storeIndex: 0, args: [6, 12] }] }; }

cases.name: 境界値: silver直前、goldちょうど、silverちょうど

input.factory: () => { const judge = function(visits, purchasePoint) { let total = visits * this.pointPerVisit + purchasePoint; if (this.weekend) { total += this.weekendBonus; } let tier = "regular"; if (total >= this.goldLine) { tier = "gold"; } else if (total >= this.silverLine) { tier = "silver"; } return this.name + "|" + tier + "|" + total; }; return { judge: judge, stores: [{ name: "north", pointPerVisit: 10, weekendBonus: 5, silverLine: 50, goldLine: 90, weekend: true }, { name: "south", pointPerVisit: 7, weekendBonus: 20, silverLine: 60, goldLine: 80, weekend: true }, { name: "center", pointPerVisit: 4, weekendBonus: 0, silverLine: 25, goldLine: 45, weekend: false }], requests: [{ storeIndex: 0, args: [4, 4] }, { storeIndex: 1, args: [5, 25] }, { storeIndex: 2, args: [5, 5] }, { storeIndex: 1, args: [2, 10] }] }; }

() => { const judge = function(visits, purchasePoint) { let score = visits * this.visitPoint + purchasePoint; if (this.weekend) { score += this.weekendBonus; } let rank = "regular"; if (score >= this.goldLine) { rank = "gold"; } else if (score >= this.silverLine) { rank = "silver"; } return this.name + ":" + rank + ":" + score; }; return { judge: judge, stores: [{ name: "solo", visitPoint: 6, weekendBonus: 3, silverLine: 20, goldLine: 40, weekend: true }], requests: [] }; }

cases.name: 同じ店舗を複数回使い、ランク更新の優先順位を確認する

input.factory: () => { const judge = function(visits, purchasePoint) { const total = visits * this.multiplier + purchasePoint + this.offset; let band = "regular"; if (total >= this.high) { band = "gold"; } else if (total >= this.middle) { band = "silver"; } return this.label + ":" + band + ":" + total; }; return { judge: judge, stores: [{ label: "one", multiplier: 3, offset: 9, middle: 20, high: 35 }, { label: "two", multiplier: 12, offset: 0, middle: 25, high: 50 }], requests: [{ storeIndex: 0, args: [2, 5] }, { storeIndex: 1, args: [1, 13] }, { storeIndex: 0, args: [7, 5] }, { storeIndex: 1, args: [0, 24] }] }; }
